mapper.sql: CASE o.status WHEN 0 THEN 'PENDING' WHEN 1 THEN 'CONFIRMED' WHEN 2 THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE 'CANCELLED' END
CASE t.category WHEN 0 THEN 'EXPRESS' WHEN 1 THEN 'STUDY' WHEN 2 THEN 'SECOND_HAND' WHEN 3 THEN 'TEAM_UP' ELSE 'OTHER' END
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_order ( task_id, poster_id, helper_id, status, version ) VALUES ( #{taskId}, #{posterId}, #{helperId}, #{status}, #{version} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, task_id, poster_id, helper_id, status, version, create_time, update_time, is_deleted FROM t_order WHERE id = #{orderId} AND is_deleted = false LIMIT 1

SELECT o.id AS orderId, t.id AS taskId, t.title AS taskTitle, t.description AS taskDescription, AS taskCategory, t.location AS taskLocation, t.reward, AS status, poster.id AS posterId, poster.nickname AS posterName, poster.avatar_url AS posterAvatarUrl, poster.credit_score AS posterCreditScore, helper.id AS helperId, helper.nickname AS helperName, helper.avatar_url AS helperAvatarUrl, helper.credit_score AS helperCreditScore, o.create_time AS createdAt, o.update_time AS updatedAt FROM t_order o JOIN t_task t ON t.id = o.task_id AND t.is_deleted = false JOIN u_user poster ON poster.id = o.poster_id AND poster.is_deleted = false JOIN u_user helper ON helper.id = o.helper_id AND helper.is_deleted = false WHERE o.id = #{orderId} AND o.is_deleted = false LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_order o WHERE o.is_deleted = false AND ( (#{role} = 'poster' AND o.poster_id = #{userId}) OR (#{role} = 'helper' AND o.helper_id = #{userId}) OR (#{role} IS NULL AND (o.poster_id = #{userId} OR o.helper_id = #{userId})) )
AND o.status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_order WHERE helper_id = #{userId} AND status = 2 AND is_deleted = false
